reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 3.44x ATR. 2. SL Dist: [Base 1.8x + Offset 0.15x]. 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.76. 4. Regime: [NORMAL/RANGE-BOUND]. 5. Logic: Price is currently at the Point of Control (POC), the highest-volume node of the range, which acts as a magnet and a resistance level when approached from below on declining volume. The 15m chart shows clear volume-price divergence and exhaustion wicks at this level. Following the 'Range Rotation' principle, the high-probability move is a mean reversion back toward the Value Area Low (VAL) near 64,000. The SL is placed above the Value Area High (VAH) to protect against an outlier breakout.
reasoning_zh: 1. TP距离：3.44x ATR。2. SL距离：[1.8x基准 + 0.15x偏移]。3. 盈亏比：1.76。4. 市场环境：[正常波动/区间震荡]。5. 逻辑：价格目前处于控制点（POC）67,694，这是区间内成交量最集中的“公平价值”区，在成交量萎缩的情况下从下方触及该位通常表现为强阻力。15分钟图显示明显的量价背离和受阻影线。基于“区间轮动”原理，高概率走势是向价值区低点（VAL）64,000附近进行均值回归。止损位设在价值区高点（VAH）上方，以防范超预期的区间突破。
